tasks.title: Scaffold Astro+TS+Tailwind project with full toolchain
tasks.description: Create the Astro 4 project (static output) with TypeScript strict, Tailwind via @astrojs/tailwind, and the full quality toolchain. astro.config.mjs must read `site` and `base` from env (BASE_PATH default '/'), set output:'static' with a comment documenting the static->hybrid upgrade path, and be ready for a later sitemap integration. Wire exact npm scripts from project.md: dev, build, typecheck (astro check), test (vitest run), test:e2e (playwright test), lint (eslint .), format (prettier --write .), preview. Include a passing sample Vitest test and a trivial Playwright smoke spec + playwright.config.ts and vitest.config.ts. Pin Node via .nvmrc/engines. .gitignore excludes node_modules, dist, .astro, test-results, playwright-report. Do NOT add any UI framework. Do NOT create README (owned by T-013) or page content. Acceptance: install+build emits static dist/; typecheck passes strict; test + test:e2e wired and green; lint + format clean; tailwind wired; output static with upgrade-path comment; node pinned; gitignore correct.
acceptance: npm install then npm run build succeeds and emits static dist/
npm run typecheck passes with strict TypeScript
npm run test runs Vitest with a passing sample; test:e2e wired with a smoke spec
npm run lint and npm run format run clean
astro.config.mjs reads site/base from env (BASE_PATH default /) and wires @astrojs/tailwind
output:'static' set with a comment documenting static->hybrid upgrade path
Node pinned; .gitignore excludes node_modules, dist, .astro, test artifacts
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — standard scaffold from explicit config, but it's the root dependency for every task so correctness matters; not mechanical enough for haiku

tasks.title: Implement warm-trattoria design system (tokens + primitives)
tasks.description: Implement ADR 0002 design system. Extend tailwind.config.mjs theme with named tokens: terracotta (~#B5562F), olive (~#5B6236), cream (~#FBF6EC), charcoal (~#2B2622), gold (~#C8972B) and warm neutrals — components must reference token names, never raw hex. Load an elegant serif display font (e.g. Fraunces/Playfair) + clean sans body (e.g. Inter) with font-display:swap and limited weights. Create src/styles/global.css (base + tokens + reduced-motion support). Build Button.astro (variants primary|secondary|ghost; renders <a> or <button>; visible :focus-visible) and Section.astro (max-width, padding, vertical rhythm). Add a /styleguide route demonstrating tokens + primitives (exclude from nav/sitemap). Ensure body/background contrast >=4.5:1. No raw hex outside tailwind.config/global.css.
acceptance: Tailwind theme defines terracotta/olive/cream/charcoal/gold + warm neutrals, referenced by name not hex
Serif display + sans body fonts load with font-display:swap and limited weights
Button.astro supports primary|secondary|ghost, renders as <a> or <button>, has :focus-visible styles
Section.astro gives consistent max-width/padding/rhythm
Body vs background contrast >=4.5:1; prefers-reduced-motion respected
/styleguide renders tokens + primitives
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — visual design system from a locked ADR; consistent token work, single concern

tasks.title: Menu/bar/site content collections + seeded real data + query lib
tasks.description: Define typed Astro content collections in src/content/config.ts: menuItem { id, name, description?, category, variants:[{label?, price}], tags:string[], featured?:bool, marketPrice?:bool }, barItem { id, name, description?, category, variants:[{label?, price}] }, and site info (name, address, phone, hours, etc.). Seed faithfully from the gathered real content across ALL food categories (Starters, Soups & Salads, Pizza incl. multi-size variants, Calzone & Stromboli, Pasta, Hot Subs, Baked Pasta, Chicken, Veal, Seafood incl. market-price lobster, Ribeye, Sides, Desserts, Lunch Specials, Children's, Drinks) and bar categories (wine by varietal w/ glass+bottle, domestic+import beer, specialty cocktails) with correct names/descriptions/prices. Apply filter tags (vegetarian, seafood, chicken, veal, pizza, pasta, house-favorite) and mark a few `featured` signature dishes. Implement src/lib/menu.ts pure fns: getCategories(), groupByCategory(items), filterItems(items,{category?,tags?,query?}), formatPrice(n) -> '$X.XX'; unit-test in tests/menu.test.ts. Prices in one consistent representation (document it). Records shaped to later become cart items/DB rows. No presentation/markup. Do not invent items not in the gathered content; represent market price explicitly.
acceptance: config.ts schemas for menuItem, barItem, site defined; build fails on schema violation
Food data seeded faithfully across all listed categories incl. multi-size pizza + wing variants and market-price items
Bar data seeded: wine by varietal (glass+bottle), domestic+import beer, specialty cocktails
Tags applied for filtering; a few featured signature dishes set
src/lib/menu.ts exports getCategories/groupByCategory/filterItems/formatPrice, unit-tested
Prices stored consistently; formatPrice renders $X.XX
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — schema design + faithful data transcription + pure functions; needs care with real data but well-specified

tasks.title: GitHub Pages CI workflow, .nojekyll, base-path check script, deploy docs
tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/deploy.yml building on push to the default branch with actions/configure-pages, actions/upload-pages-artifact, actions/deploy-pages (pinned versions), correct permissions (pages: write, id-token: write) and concurrency. Derive BASE_PATH from the repo name for the build. Emit public/.nojekyll so Astro's underscore-prefixed assets serve. Add scripts/check-base-paths.mjs that scans the built dist/ and asserts internal links/asset URLs are prefixed with the configured base (fails on a bare leading-slash internal href). Write README.md documenting: enabling Pages -> 'GitHub Actions' source, the resulting URL pattern https://<owner>.github.io/<repo>/, and setting PUBLIC_FORMSPREE_ID as a repo variable for live forms. astro.config is already base/site-aware from T-001 (do not edit it here). Do not author the 404 page here (owned by T-004). Workflow must be valid YAML; no secrets required for the static build.
acceptance: deploy.yml builds on default-branch push via configure-pages/upload-pages-artifact/deploy-pages with correct permissions+concurrency and BASE_PATH from repo name
.nojekyll emitted into the artifact
scripts/check-base-paths.mjs verifies built internal links/assets are base-prefixed
README documents enabling Pages (Actions source), the URL, and PUBLIC_FORMSPREE_ID repo variable
Workflow is valid YAML with pinned action versions; no secrets needed for static build
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — CI + base-path correctness has real footguns (Pages subpath, permissions); above mechanical

tasks.title: Site shell: BaseLayout, Header/nav, Footer, withBase(), submit() seam, 404
tasks.description: Build the shared shell. BaseLayout.astro accepts title/description, slots content, has <header>/<main>/<footer> landmarks + a skip-to-content link. Header.astro: desktop nav (Home, Menu, From the Bar, Catering, Gallery, About, Contact) + prominent 'Reserve' CTA, aria-current on active page, and an accessible mobile hamburger (<768px) toggling a menu with aria-expanded, Esc-to-close, proper focus management, keyboard operable. Footer.astro: address, tel: click-to-call, hours summary, social placeholders, current year. src/lib/base.ts exports withBase(path); ALL internal links/assets in the shell use it (unit-test withBase in tests/base.test.ts incl. BASE_PATH=/fratellis/). src/lib/submit.ts exports submit(formName,payload):Promise<SubmitResult> with a Formspree impl when PUBLIC_FORMSPREE_ID is set and a mailto: fallback otherwise; unit-test payload-building + endpoint-selection in tests/submit.test.ts. Components must call submit(), never inline transport. Also create 404.astro (uses BaseLayout) building to 404.html. No horizontal scroll at 320px; nav+footer keyboard+contrast clean.
acceptance: BaseLayout has title/description, landmarks, skip link
Header has full nav + Reserve CTA + aria-current; mobile hamburger accessible (aria-expanded, Esc, focus mgmt, keyboard)
Footer shows address, tel: phone, hours summary, social placeholders, current year
withBase() used for all internal links; unit-tested incl. /fratellis/ base
submit() seam with Formspree + mailto fallback; unit-tested; components never inline transport
404.astro builds to 404.html; no horizontal scroll at 320px
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — central shell consumed by every page incl. the swappable submit seam; cross-cutting but well-specified, lean toward reliability

tasks.title: Contact page + open-now hours logic, HoursTable, OpenNowBadge, MapEmbed
tasks.description: Implement src/lib/hours.ts pure isOpenNow(hours, now) and nextChange(hours, now) computing in America/Chicago; tests inject `now` (never system clock) covering each day incl. Monday-closed and Fri/Sat late close (tests/hours.test.ts). OpenNowBadge.astro renders 'Open now' / 'Closed — opens <day/time>'. HoursTable.astro renders the full weekly hours. MapEmbed.astro is a lazy, titled keyless Google Maps embed iframe for the address. /contact page shows HoursTable (Tue-Thu & Sun 11-9, Fri-Sat 11-10, Mon closed), address, tel: click-to-call, the map, and a Get Directions link — all contact facts sourced from src/content/site (not hard-coded). Responsive + keyboard accessible, no console errors. This open-now logic + badge are reused by Home and the Header.
acceptance: isOpenNow/nextChange pure, America/Chicago, tested across days incl. Mon-closed and Fri/Sat late
OpenNowBadge renders open/closed-opens-next states
/contact shows weekly hours, address, tel: phone, titled lazy map iframe, Get Directions link
All contact facts come from src/content/site, not hard-coded
Responsive + keyboard accessible, no console errors
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — timezone-aware open-now logic has edge cases but is unit-testable and well-scoped

tasks.title: Visual filterable food menu page
tasks.description: Build /menu rendering every category section from T-003 data with all items + prices (multi-variant items show each priced variant). Components: MenuSection.astro, DishCard.astro (structure must not preclude a future action/add button), MenuFilter.astro + a progressive-enhancement island. Sticky category navigator/anchors with active indication. Tag filter chips + live debounced case-insensitive text search (name/description) using the pure filterItems from src/lib/menu.ts; combining tags+search works; clear-filters resets; result count announced; no-results state. Full menu visible with JS disabled. Featured dishes highlighted. Keyboard accessible (chips are buttons, search labelled), no horizontal scroll at 320px, images have alt. Playwright e2e (e2e/menu.spec.ts): filter narrows results, search finds a known dish, clear resets.
acceptance: /menu renders every category with items+prices; multi-variant items show each price
Sticky category navigator with active indication
Tag chips + live search via filterItems; combine works; clear resets; result count announced; no-results state
Progressive enhancement: full menu visible without JS
Featured dishes highlighted; keyboard accessible; no 320px horizontal scroll
Playwright e2e covers filter, search, clear
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — flagship interactive page, but logic is in tested lib fns and criteria are explicit

tasks.title: Reservation request page + validated form via submit() seam
tasks.description: Build /reservations with ReservationForm.astro (+ island): fields name(req), phone(req), email(req valid), date(req, not past), time(req), party size(req 1-20+), notes(opt). Implement pure validators in src/lib/form.ts (unit-tested tests/form.test.ts): reject empty required, invalid email, past dates; inline screen-reader-associated errors (aria-invalid/aria-describedby); submit blocked until valid. On valid submit call submit('reservation', payload) from src/lib/submit.ts (never hard-code transport); success -> confirmation state (clear/lock form); failure -> retryable error. With PUBLIC_FORMSPREE_ID unset, compose a documented mailto: fallback and explain it in the UI. Copy must state this is a request, not a guaranteed table; v1 stores nothing. Keyboard accessible, visible focus, no console errors. Playwright e2e (e2e/reservation.spec.ts): empty submit shows errors; valid data reaches confirmation/intended-submit path (transport stubbed).
acceptance: Form fields with stated requirements present
Pure validators reject empty required/invalid email/past date; inline a11y errors; submit blocked until valid
Valid submit calls submit('reservation', payload); success confirmation; failure retryable; no hard-coded transport
mailto: fallback when PUBLIC_FORMSPREE_ID unset, explained in UI
Keyboard accessible; copy states request-not-guaranteed
Playwright e2e covers empty-errors and valid-submit path
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — form + validation from explicit criteria; canonical submit-seam example, worth care

tasks.title: Photo gallery with accessible lightbox
tasks.description: Build /gallery: responsive masonry/grid of license-clear placeholder images (clearly named placeholder-*/manifest, documented swap process; no images scraped from the original site), each with descriptive alt, lazy-loaded, appropriately sized (no CLS). Gallery.astro + a lightbox island: activate via Enter/Space, Esc closes, focus trapped, arrow keys navigate, prefers-reduced-motion respected. Grid view fully usable without JS. Responsive 320px+, no horizontal scroll. Playwright e2e: lightbox opens and closes.
acceptance: Responsive grid of placeholder images with alt, lazy-loaded, no CLS
Accessible lightbox: keyboard open/close/navigate, focus trap, reduced-motion
Usable without JS; images in public with placeholder-* convention + documented swap; none scraped
Responsive 320px+, no horizontal scroll; e2e opens+closes lightbox
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — accessible lightbox interaction needs careful keyboard/focus handling

tasks.title: Testimonials content + page + reusable component
tasks.description: Add a typed testimonials collection to src/content/config.ts ({quote, author?, source?}) and seed it with the gathered reviews (attribution as 'Verified guest'/source where the original had no name — do not invent names or quotes). Build /testimonials rendering all reviews in a warm readable layout using design tokens with <blockquote>/<cite> semantics, responsive + accessible. Build Testimonials.astro rendering a 1-3 subset from the same data for reuse on the home page (no duplication). Note: this task edits config.ts (already created by T-003) — only append the testimonials collection; do not alter menu/bar/site schemas.
acceptance: Typed testimonials collection seeded with gathered reviews; no invented names/quotes
/testimonials renders all reviews with blockquote/cite semantics, responsive + accessible
Testimonials component renders a 1-3 subset from same data for home reuse

Warm editorial layout with >=1 image and a pull-quote, responsive, tokens-based. Include CTAs to View Menu and Reserve (withBase links). Accessible headings/landmarks, image alt text. Do not fabricate awards, named chefs, or history beyond what was gathered.
acceptance: /about presents gathered facts rewritten in our own voice (not verbatim)
Editorial layout with image + pull-quote, responsive, tokens-styled
CTAs to Menu and Reserve; accessible; image alt
No invented facts/credentials

tasks.title: SEO/meta, Open Graph, JSON-LD Restaurant schema, sitemap, robots
tasks.description: Add per-page SEO. BaseLayout renders title/description (pages already pass them) + Seo.astro for OG/Twitter tags (title, description, image, url) base/site-aware on all pages; provide a default og-default share image. Canonical + metadata URLs respect site+base. RestaurantSchema.astro emits JSON-LD Restaurant: name, address (17588 Airline Hwy, Prairieville, LA 70769), telephone +1-225-313-4704, openingHoursSpecification matching the hours data (single source from T-005/site), servesCuisine Italian, priceRange, hasMenu -> /menu; must be well-formed JSON-LD. Wire @astrojs/sitemap in astro.config.mjs generating sitemap.xml (exclude /styleguide); add public/robots.txt referencing it. Ensure no broken internal links at build. This task edits BaseLayout.astro and astro.config.mjs — coordinate (no other task in this wave touches them). Do not fabricate ratings/review-count structured data.

OG + Twitter tags on all pages with a default share image
Canonical/metadata URLs respect site+base
JSON-LD Restaurant schema with accurate name/address/phone/hours/cuisine/priceRange/hasMenu; well-formed

tasks.title: Full-site base-path build verification + link/asset integrity
tasks.description: Final integration gate. Run a production build with the Pages base set (BASE_PATH=/fratellis/ npm run build) and execute scripts/check-base-paths.mjs over the full dist/ to assert every internal link and asset URL is correctly prefixed (no bare leading-slash internal hrefs, no broken references). Also run the dependency audit and the secret-scan gate from project.md. Fix any base-path violations found in the offending source files (links must route through withBase()). This task asserts the whole site — created after all pages, SEO, and deploy infra exist.
acceptance: BASE_PATH=/fratellis/ production build passes check-base-paths over full dist/ (all internal links/assets prefixed)
No broken internal links or asset references in the built site
Dependency audit and secret-scan gates pass
tasks.modelReason: sonnet — cross-cutting verification + targeted fixes across the built site
